cartoons.image_alt: Two people sit on a couch looking at an iPad with a cat on it.
cartoons.caption: "I searched ‘funny cat videos,’ but things are so bad that they’re all making serious ones."
cartoons.author: Paul Noth
cartoons.title: Daily Cartoon: Monday, March 9th

humor_links.title: How to be a mysterious woman who is also in bed by 9:30 P.M.
I’ll have kids in a few years, when I’m successful and wealthy and my life is finally perfect.
I am a Tinder guy holding a fish, and I will provide for you.
The most effective group-chat-ending texts.
Common anatomies of disappointing men.
Behold, I have returned from a hike.

humor_links.title: Why you’re considered attractive.
I’ll start this new project just as soon as all conditions in my life are perfect.
More precise names for the “Personal Life” section on Wikipedia.

Hinder: a dating app for emotionally unavailable men.

cartoons.image_alt: A woman digs a car out of deep snow. A sullen child sits nearby next to an unused shovel.
cartoons.caption: "If you don’t help dig out the car, then I can’t take you to school, and if you don’t go to school I’m going to lose my friggin’ mind. You don’t want Mommy to lose her friggin’ mind, do you?"
